query:
SELECT 'Clientes' as tabla, COUNT(*) as cantidad FROM clients
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Citas', COUNT(*) FROM appointments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Asesoramientos', COUNT(*) FROM advisoryRequests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Cotizaciones', COUNT(*) FROM quotations
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Proyectos', COUNT(*) FROM projects
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Tareas', COUNT(*) FROM tasks
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Recordatorios', COUNT(*) FROM reminders
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Usuarios', COUNT(*) FROM users;
